Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is fishing in Rockport Texas with Baseball Buddies, Trapped redfish in low tide.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is fishing for smallmouth in the St Lawrence River.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing Caney Lake in Louisiana.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Windy and hot
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Cane Pole fishing for crappie and bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Pro Angler Chuck Stratton is fishing with Jimmy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Fishing with chuck
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is fishing with Professional angler Edwin Evers in Oklahoma.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hobie Outdoor Adventures flies down to the southernmost country of Central America, the Republic of Panama, and heads to a secluded coast with a lush rainforest coastline, where the only way to fish is from a kayak.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hobie Outdoor Adventures goes to Austin, Texas for some bass fishing and then to the BassMaster Classic for insight into the Hobie product line. And finally, we spend some time on the water with the Hobie Pro Angler.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hobie Fishing — Austin, Texas Bass Fishing & the Hobie Pro Angler
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hobie Outdoor Adventures heads to Mexico's Baja peninsula looking for giant rooster fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hobie Outdoor Adventures heads to the Boston area for some striper fishing before going to ICAST for a new product feature from Hobie Kayaks. Finally, you'll learn more about what's ahead in our adventures.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hobie Outdoor Adventure - Stripers and More
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Perry kick off an adventurous journey down the Ivanhoe River, heading toward a lake that’s known to deliver steady walleye action. But this time, the fish had other plans. With walleye proving tough to track down, the duo turns to the river’s reliable residents—Northern Pike—to keep the rods bending and the spirits high. Surrounded by stunning scenery, flowing rapids, and beautiful waterfalls, this river run becomes more than just a fishing trip—it’s a reminder that the North’s wild beauty always makes the day worthwhile, no matter what’s biting.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | River Run Redemption

Video.summary: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Up the Creek
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Up the Creek
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We saved the best for last. Part three of our Cedros adventure has fantastic fishing for three different species. Big Yellowtail in the morning, Epic calico bass at the famous Chesters rock during the afternoon, and some epic kelp paddy Dorado fishing on the way home.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Spring Walleye fishing on Horwood Lake friendly competition with local anglers using crank baits and jigging.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace head to Sturgeon Lake in Sunset Country to catch walleyes, pike and lake trout.
Video.grandparentTitle: Linder's Angling Edge | Fishing Ontario’s Sturgeon Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the best Sportfishing in the world takes place in Costa Rica. Especially out of a village named Nosara. The Nosara area is far from commercial fishing lanes and off tourists' beaten paths and is a best kept secret fishing and surfing destination. On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we fish for Tuna, Billfish, and Dorado.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Costa Rica's Best Kept Fishing Secret, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Aligator Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace use Humminbird Mega LIVE to pinpoint and dropshot up some Minnesota gold.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Mega LIVE Dropshot Walleyes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Dan Lindner demonstrate how finding and catching magnum-sized mid-summer crappies can be easier than you think
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Putting Okumas new Serrano Series Bass Rods to the test, Shea McIntee heads out with a good friend and local guide, Todd Kline, for an epic day of early winter Bass fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Winter Bass Fishing at Lake Perris
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett is joined by fellow cancer survivor and tournament angler Chase Heaton as they battle large smallmouth bass on Washingtons Snake River
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Known to be colony breeders, Redear Sunfish are a popular gamefish. Kim targets these tasty spawners and provides a rarely-seen underwater view of their reproductive courtship.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe- Heads up at Live Oak
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Heads up at Live Oak
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we travel to Ole's Adventure Lodge on the picturesque Whitefish Lake, just west of Thunder Bay, Ontario. In this special episode, we shine a spotlight on the Experience Fishing program, dedicated to introducing the joys of angling to children, new Canadians, and women. Witness the excitement of first-time fishing adventures in a breathtaking setting that inspires connection with nature and community.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Experience Fishing at Ole's Adventure Lodge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw enjoys hard-hitting Deep-South bass action on jerkbaits at Live Oak Plantation.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Live Oak Largemouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's Musky time! This week, we're meeting up with our good friend Jeff Van Remortel to try and catch a giant! Big fish, great tips, and good times this week, so hang onto your hineys!
Video.title: Big Water Muskies

Video.summary: The night bite in Sturgeon Bay is on fire! In this week's episode, we’re meeting with our good friends Lonney Goman from Greenbay Trophy Fishing and Scott Meiller from Rebel Converting to catch some walleye. Hold onto your hineys folks, this will be a long night!
Video.title: Night Fishing Walleye

Video.summary: Jim shows you how easy it is to build 3 different fish catching spinnerbaits.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains where to find bass under bluebird skies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks faith, fishing and more with BASS Elite series pro, Will Davis JR.
Video.title: Episode 1
